title: Owner of ski resort has big plans in the making for Girdwood facility
summary: After years of wandering lost on the edge of the wilderness as the Seibu group struggled with financial and legal problems back home in Japan, the Alyeska Resort has a new owner voicing a vision that appears to be in lockstep with Anchorage's new marketing theme. The words "Big Wild Life'' were never uttered when John Byrne III and his management team appeared at a Girdwood 2020 fundraiser last week, but the big-wild pitch was definitely lurking in the background during the packed gathering at the Alyeska Prince Hotel. Don McLean, Alyeska's new vice president and director of real estate, talked of marketing the resort 45 miles southeast of Anchorage as a "base camp for Alaska.'' Out, said McLean, is a resort-linked golf course favored by Seibu. In, said Byrne later in the evening, is a sys…

title: Marlin bout ends with Alaskans 1,  'King Kong' fish 0
summary: Photo courtesy of JIM RIZZUTO enlarge Tina and Rich Bosela of Eagle River are shown with the largest blue marlin weighed on Kona, Hawaii, since last summer.
